inventory.reason: Global --ignore-platform-reqs is forbidden. It can bypass critical missing extensions at build time, leading to container runtime crashes.
Sets Content-Type: application/json for any request with a body without checking if the body is actually JSON, which breaks FormData, URLSearchParams, and other body types.
Uses a literal data-dependent 'DU' text selector which is fragile and unstable if test user data changes.
Globally excludes multiple large selectors of EasyAdmin navigation chrome without attempting to repair contrast/naming first, and violates the rule to exclude only narrow exact selectors.
